scheduler.schedule.placementconstraint.C: An object representing a constraint on task placement.

scheduler.schedule.placementconstraint.E.Description: A cluster query language expression to apply to the constraint. You cannot specify an expression if the constraint type is `distinctInstance`. For more information, see [Cluster query language](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/latest/developerguide/cluster-query-language.html) in the *Amazon ECS Developer Guide*.

scheduler.schedule.placementconstraint.T.Description: The type of constraint. Use `distinctInstance` to ensure that each task in a particular group is running on a different container instance. Use `memberOf` to restrict the selection to a group of valid candidates.
